The Met Gala will draw some 400 or so guests.

articles.description: The 80-year-old country music star said it will take some time for her to be "stage-performance ready" again.
articles.content: "Not to mention, all those heavy rhinestone outfits, the big hair, my big uh, personality," she joked.
